import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;

  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$(), _s2 = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { createContext, useContext, useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { LanguageProvider } from "/src/app/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx";
const AppContext = createContext(void 0);
export function AppProvider({ children }) {
  _s();
  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState({
    id: "1",
    name: "Platform Admin",
    email: "admin@policynest.com",
    role: "platform-admin"
  });
  const [organizationType, setOrganizationType] = useState("AGED_CARE");
  const [auditLogs, setAuditLogs] = useState(
    [
      {
        id: "1",
        action: "Policy Created",
        user: "admin@policynest.com",
        role: "platform-admin",
        tenant: "Platform",
        timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 72e5).toISOString(),
        details: "Created new policy: Privacy Policy v1.0"
      },
      {
        id: "2",
        action: "Organization Approved",
        user: "admin@policynest.com",
        role: "platform-admin",
        tenant: "Platform",
        timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 108e5).toISOString(),
        details: "Approved organization request: Riverdale Aged Care"
      }
    ]
  );
  const addAuditLog = (log) => {
    const newLog = {
      ...log,
      id: `log-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
      timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
      user: currentUser.email,
      role: currentUser.role,
      tenant: currentUser.organizationName || "Platform"
    };
    setAuditLogs((prev) => [newLog, ...prev]);
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: LanguageProvider, _fgS: "b5kj0", _fgB: 1779104380005, _fgD: true, "data-fg-b5kj0": "418.220:758.125:/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx:84:5:2483:305:e:LanguageProvider:e:1::::Cb8L", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
    FGCmp,
    {
      _fgT: AppContext.Provider,
      _fgS: "b5kj1",
      _fgB: 1779104380005,

        currentUser,
        setCurrentUser,
        addAuditLog,
        auditLogs,
        organizationType,
        setOrganizationType
      },

      children

}

export function useApp() {
  _s2();
  const context = useContext(AppContext);
  if (context === void 0) {
    throw new Error("useApp must be used within an AppProvider");
  }
  return context;
}

var _c;

  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
